name: Muesli & Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow 11-inch x 7-inch baking pan with butter and line the bottom with parchment or waxed paper.
2. In a large bowl placed over a pan of gently simmering water, combine honey, butter, and chocolate. Stir until the butter melts; remove from heat.
3. Add all but 1/4 cup of muesli to the honey mixture.
4. Spread the mixture in the prepared pan and smooth the top with the back of a spoon.
5. Sprinkle the remaining muesli evenly over the top, pressing gently into the surface.
6. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours or until set.
7. Carefully remove the muesli mixture from the pan and take off the paper.
8. Cut into 8 squares, then cut each square in half to make 2 triangles.
9. Arrange neatly on a serving dish or store in an airtight container for up to 3 days in a cool place.
